title: High-Speed Rail (HSR)
body: Zip between major cities from Taipei to Kaohsiung in ~1.5–2 hours. Reserve seats online or at kiosks.

title: TRA & Local Lines
body: Coastal and mountain routes cover smaller towns. EasyCard works on most services.

title: Metro & Buses
body: Taipei/Kaohsiung MRT are bilingual and spotless. Bus networks are extensive and affordable.

title: Hotels & Hostels
body: From luxury towers to design hostels—book early for weekends & festivals.

title: Minshuku (B&B)
body: Warm, family-run stays—especially common on the East Coast.

title: Hot Spring Resorts
body: Soak in Beitou, Jiaoxi or mountainside retreats across the island.

title: Night Markets
body: Try snacks as you browse souvenirs—remember to bring small bills.

title: Gourmet Gifts
body: Pineapple cakes, nougat, oolong teas—pack for customs.

title: Tax Refund
body: Foreign visitors can claim VAT refunds—check store windows for the logo.
